pi_items.metadata_value: Derived from official US GSA FY2024 Per Diem Rates
pi_items.verified_value: Derived from official US GSA FY2024 Per Diem Rates
pi_items.source: Web search confirmed that the hardcoded rates in setup_task.sh match actual FY2024 GSA Per Diem rates for the listed cities (e.g., San Francisco M&IE $79).
task.json instructions and verifier.py regex patterns confirm these exact formula types are strictly required to pass the checks.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires resolving employee expenses using synthetic claim data and real FY2024 GSA Per Diem rates (e.g., San Francisco M&IE $79). The verifier strictly checks for the use of lookup functions (VLOOKUP/XLOOKUP/INDEX/MATCH), capping functions (MIN/IF), and arithmetic/summation (+/-/SUM) to calculate reimbursements and overages.
